THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FUA, BILL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1018 MISSION ST, #400, S.F, CA. $1,371.00 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,451.00, STAYED UNTIL JUN-01-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, PL. WAIVES ALL RENT & DAMAGES IF DEF. VACATES BY 9AM,6-1-94. EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR ATTY FEES. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. DEF. WARRANTS THERE ARE NO OTHER OCCUPANTS W/RIGHT OF POSSESSION.
